synopsis: The very best interviews and articles are collected in the annual Star Wars Insider Special Edition magazine. From interviews with the cast to in-depth features and rare behind-the-scenes access it's never been a better time to be an Insider! Discover what makes the characters of the Star Wars saga so compelling! Learn secrets about the amazing costumes! Plus: All-new interviews with the cast of Star Wars Rebels and a behind-the-scenes look at what it was like to be a Stormtrooper in the original trilogy!
title: Insider - Special Edition 2016
